title: campanula stevenii subsp. wolgensis
intro: Campanula stevenii subsp. wolgensis, also known as the Wolgensin bellflower, is a subspecies of the Campanula stevenii plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campanula stevenii subsp. wolgensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory agent, reducing swelling and pain. Campanula stevenii subsp. wolgensis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
